name: Wireless Mouse
shortDescription: Ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks.
fullDescription: A comfortable ergonomic wireless mouse featuring silent click technology, adjustable DPI settings, and a long-lasting rechargeable battery. Ideal for everyday office and home use.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
shortDescription: Compact mechanical keyboard with tactile switches.
fullDescription: A compact mechanical keyboard with tactile switches, durable aluminium frame, and white backlighting. Perfect for typing and light gaming.

name: USB-C Hub
shortDescription: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI and SD card reader.
fullDescription: Expand your laptop connectivity with this 7-in-1 USB-C hub featuring HDMI output, USB-A ports, SD and microSD card readers, and pass-through charging.

name: Desk Lamp
shortDescription: LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness.
fullDescription: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and colour temperature. Flexible arm and touch controls for comfortable workspace lighting.

name: Notebook Set
shortDescription: Set of three ruled A5 notebooks.
fullDescription: A set of three high-quality A5 notebooks with ruled pages, durable covers, and lay-flat binding. Great for notes, journaling, and planning.

name: Insulated Bottle
shortDescription: Stainless steel bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours.
fullDescription: Double-wall stainless steel insulated bottle that keeps beverages cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 12 hours. Leak-proof lid and easy-carry handle.

name: Laptop Stand
fullDescription: Lightweight aluminium laptop stand with adjustable height and angle. Improves posture and airflow for laptops up to 17 inches.

name: HD Webcam
fullDescription: Full HD 1080p webcam with auto-focus, built-in noise-reducing microphone, and privacy shutter. Compatible with major video conferencing apps.
